the most authentic text on astrology, i.e. Skanda Hora
(Jyotishmati Upanishad), I prefer this method of BT

method does not have much demerits and even the assumed
demerit has a positive connotation of giving a valuable and
sincere advice.
5. Gulika and birth time
The concept here is that "For correct BT the Lagna sign
will be in the trines of Gulika or Gulika Navamsa ". In other
words, "if the Lagna is in the trine of Gulika or the trine of
Gulika navamsa, then the BT can be treated as correct
(otherwise correct the BT accordingly using Varga
Chatushtaya method)".
The relation between Gulika and Lagna longitude at BT
demands a detailed discussion. Some argue that Gulika and
Mandi is one, and some say that they are different, some
